prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in `kubernetes/kubernetes` that define struct fields or constants with `Deprecated` in the identifier name. Search `staging/src/k8s.io/api/` and `pkg/apis/` directories. Only include files that DEFINE the deprecated identifiers — do not include files that merely reference or use these deprecated fields.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
